title: zanthoxylum alatum var. planispinum
intro: Zanthoxylum alatum var. planispinum, also known as the Himalayan prickly ash, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, characterized by its distinctive thorny twigs and aromatic properties. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum alatum var. planispinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide pain relief. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
